#  Enable the DocuSignÂŽ Integration on Your Company's Procore Account 
##  Background 
If your company wants your project team to use the Procore + DocuSignÂŽ integration to request electronic signatures, complete these steps:
  1. **Enable the DocuSignÂŽ Integration at the Company Level**. Your company's [Procore Administrator](https://support.procore.com/procore-learning-paths/general-contractor/procore-administrator) can use the steps below.
  2. **Enable the DocuSignÂŽ Integration on Your Company's Projects**. When you enable the integration on the Company level, Procore also automatically enables it on your new and existing projects. If your team is creating Procore projects using a Procore Project Template where the DocuSignÂŽ integration has NOT been enabled, Procore recommends that a user with the required users permissions do the following:
     * Enable the DocuSignÂŽ integration on your existing projects that were based on a template. See [Enable or Disable the DocuSignÂŽ Integration on a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-the-docusign-integration-on-a-procore-project).
     * Update your existing project templates to ensure that the DocuSignÂŽ is turned ON in future projects created with your template(s). See [Edit a Project Template](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-company/tutorials/edit-a-project-template). 
#####  Tip
**Don't want to use the DocuSignÂŽ integration on a new Procore project?** After the DocuSignÂŽ integration is enabled in Procore's Company Admin tool, you must manually disable it on any new project where you do not want to use it. See [Enable or Disable the DocuSignÂŽ Integration on a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-the-docusign-integration-on-a-procore-project).
  3. **Set Up a DocuSignÂŽ Account**. To request signatures using the Procore + DocuSignÂŽ integration, you must have an active DocuSignÂŽ account. For details, see:
     * [Do I need a DocuSignÂŠ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-do-i-need-a-docusign-account)
     * [How do I get a DocuSignÂŽ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account)
  4. **Link Your DocuSignÂŽ Account to your Procore Projec** t. If you will be using the Procore + DocuSignÂŽ integration to request signatures, see [Link Your DocuSignÂŽ Account to a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/docusign/tutorials/link-your-docusign-account-to-a-procore-project).


##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the company's Admin tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To request signatures using the Procore + DocuSignÂŽ integration, you must have an active DocuSignÂŽ account. For details, see:
      * [Do I need a DocuSignÂŠ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-do-i-need-a-docusign-account)
      * [How do I get a DocuSignÂŽ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account)


##  Prerequisites 
  * Review [Which Procore project tools support the DocuSignÂŽ integration?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-project-tools-support-the-docusign-integration)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the company's **Admin** tool.
  2. Under **Project Settings** , click the **Defaults** link.
  3. Scroll to the **Advanced Settings** section and mark the **Enable DocuSignÂŽ** checkbox.   
  
![Co Admin Adv Settings Enable Docusign](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/924a787dab99ce24ac2796a6c4f779b4/2f2224427cad7613b306632e1973ea35/co-admin-adv-settings-enable-docusign.png?fm=webp)  

  4. Click **Save Changes**.   
The Active Feature List Updated banner appears to confirm that the integration was enabled.


##  Next Steps 
  * [Enable or Disable the DocuSignÂŽ Integration on a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/enable-or-disable-the-docusign-integration-on-a-procore-project)


## See Also

  * [How do I get a DocuSignÂŽ account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-do-i-get-a-docusign-account)
title: Enable the DocuSignÂŽ Integration on Your Company's Procore Account
